from 8.03 % to 7.66 % HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund Overview Get key fund statistics, minimum investment details, AUM, expense ratio, exit load, and tax treatment. Expense ratio 1.23% Benchmark IISL Nifty Housing TR INR AUM ₹1086 Cr Inception Date 6 December, 2017 Min Lumpsum/SIP ₹100/₹100 Exit Load 1.0% Lock In No Lock-in TurnOver 5.35% Risk Very High Risk About HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund is an equity fund. This fund was started on 6 December, 2017. The fund is managed by Srinivasan Ramamurthy, Dhruv Muchhal. The fund could potentially beat inflation in the long-run. Key Parameters HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund has ₹1086 Cr worth of assets under management (AUM) as on Apr 2026 and is more than category average. The fund has an expense ratio 1.2. Returns HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund has given a CAGR return of 10.94% since inception. Over the last 1, 3 and 5 years the fund has given a CAGR return of 5.37%, 17.97% and 17.25% respectively. Holdings HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund has allocated its funds majorly in Cash Equivalent, Financial Services, Basic Materials, Industrial, Utilities, Consumer Cyclical, Real Estate. Its top holdings are Larsen & Toubro Ltd, NTPC Ltd, HDFC Bank Ltd, State Bank of India, ICICI Bank Ltd Taxation As it is a equity - other mutual fund the taxation is as follows:For short term (less than a year) capital gains will be taxed at 20% For long term (more than 1 year) capital gains will be taxed at 12.5% without indexation benefit Dividends will always be taxed at slab rate. Long term gains upto Rs 1 lakh are exempt capital gains tax. Investment objective of HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund To provide long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity related instruments of entities engaged in and/or expected to benefit from the growth in housing and its allied business activities. There is no assurance that the investment objective of the Scheme will be realized. Minimum Investment and lockin period Minimum investment for lump sum payment is INR 100.00 and for SIP is INR 100.00. HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund has no lock in period. Know more about HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund Fund Manager Srinivasan Ramamurthy Fund Manager of  HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund, since 12 January 2024 Dhruv Muchhal Fund Manager of  HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund, since 22 June 2023 Learn more about HDFC Mutual Fund AUM Change All changes are between Jan'26 and Mar'26 Parameters Mar'26 Feb'26 Jan'26 AUM ₹ 1.3K Cr ₹ 1.3K Cr ₹ 1.2K Cr AUM of the fund stands at 1.3K Cr as of Mar'26 AUM has remained same  between Mar'26 and Feb'26 Compare HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund VS ICICI Prudential India Opportunities Fund Frequently Asked Questions for HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund How do I invest in HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund? INDmoney makes it simple to invest in the HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund. To do so, follow the steps below: Download the INDmoney app. Search for ‘HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund’. Select whether you want to invest in SIP or lump sum. Enter the amount you wish to invest. Set up payments via bank mandate or UPI. What is the current NAV of HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund? The NAV of the fund today is ₹23.82. NAV or Net Asset Value is the per unit price of a mutual fund. For example, if the NAV of a fund is ₹10, it means you can get 1000 units of that mutual fund at ₹10,000. What is the return on the fund? HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund fund has generated a return of 5.37% in 1 year, 17.97% in 3 years, 17.25% in 5 years. Who is the fund manager of HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund? The fund managers are Srinivasan Ramamurthy, Dhruv Muchhal. What is the exit load of the fund? The exit load is 1% if redeemed in 0-30 Days. Exit load is a fee levied for ‘exiting’ the fund earlier than a stipulated period, usually 1 year. What is the expense ratio of the fund? The expense ratio is 1.23%. The Expense Ratio is a fee charged for managing the fund. This includes commissions, administrative costs etc. What is the AUM of the fund? The AUM of the fund is ₹1086 Cr. AUM stands for Assets Under Management. It refers to the total assets managed by the fund. What are the top holdings of HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund? The top 3 holdings of the fund are Larsen & Toubro Ltd(8.71%), NTPC Ltd(8.53%), HDFC Bank Ltd(8.42%) Invest Now
